_inspectorSnowReport.Report:
2:52 PM - Ursa is going on a wind delay. All upper mountain lifts are currently delayed.

2:50 PM - Villager is on a wind delay.

1:36 PM - Shooting Star is on a wind delay.

9:00 AM - Snow Bowl Express is on a wind delay.

7:59AM - The Gondola will be delayed due to high winds at the summit.

3/14 2:33PM - Winter’s not over just yet! With 4 inches of fluffy snow in the last 24 hours and cold temperatures holding strong, we’re set up for a great weekend. Tomorrow we’ll be making turns on fresh snow across 68 open trails, with the grooming team packing in the powder on 60 of those trails overnight. Please note there is no beginner skiing or riding from the summit. For your way up, 12 lifts are scheduled to spin at 8:30AM, with the possibility of delays due to high winds. Early access for First Tracks pass holders is planned for tomorrow, but please call (802)297-INFO for confirmation in the morning. For those of you sticking around tonight, be sure to head to the Main Base area for fireworks kicking off at 9PM! Tune in bright and early for Sunday’s plan; See you then!

Safety Tip: Be aware, unmarked hazards exist.
